data.title: US lawmakers propose ‘Mined in America Act’ to increase BTC mining, confirm reserves. US hosts 38% of hashrate but 97% of machines are Chinese-made.
data.description: A recent report by a Bitcoin policy advocate revealed that although the US currently accommodates 38% of Bitcoin's total hashrate, a staggering 97% of the mining machines used for Bitcoin mining operations are manufactured by only two Chinese companies. This disparity between mining machine production and operational hosting showcases the concentrated influence of Chinese companies in the Bitcoin mining industry.

data.title: Artist Uses Flies to Reveal the Truth About Sodium
data.description: Renowned contemporary artist John Knuth, based in Los Angeles, draws from 15 years of fly research to produce art showcasing the high levels of salt found in common dishes. His latest series of paintings, unveiled in Singapore on March 30, 2026, are created through the interaction of houseflies with the materials.

data.title: Realty Income Prices $800 Million Offering of Senior Notes due 2033
data.description: San Diego-based Realty Income Corporation, traded on NYSE as O, unveiled the pricing details of their latest public offering. The company announced the offering of $800 million in 4.750% senior unsecured notes, which are set to mature on April 15, 2033. The public offering price for...

data.title: NAVER D2SF Makes Follow-On Investment in Nuvilab, AI Nutrition Analytics Startup
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in SEONGNAM, South Korea, NAVER D2SF, the venture capital division of NAVER, made an additional investment in Nuvilab. Nuvilab is a healthcare startup specializing in AI-driven nutrition analytics. NAVER had initially invested in Nuvilab when it was established in 2021. This recent investment marks a continued support for Nuvilab's growth and development.

data.title: NAVER D2SF Makes Follow-On Investment in Soundable Health, an AI-Driven Health Tech Startup Scaling in the U.S. Market
data.description: In Seoul, South Korea, on March 30, 2026, NAVER D2SF, the corporate venture capital division of NAVER, has announced its additional investment in Soundable Health. Soundable Health is a health tech startup that utilizes AI technology for acoustic analysis. This innovation allows for clinical-level diagnostics to be carried out using common everyday devices.

data.title: ePLDT Group Powers Enterprise Transformation, Customer-Centric Innovation with CSG
data.description: In the Philippines, ePLDT has selected CSG to enhance services for enterprise customers with a focus on expediting activation processes, providing personalized technology solutions, and streamlining billing procedures. This partnership aims to improve customer experience through quicker service activation, customized tech options, and simplified billing processes.

data.title: Organigram Announces Shareholder Approval of Acquisition of Sanity Group GmbH and Results of its Annual General and Special Meeting
data.description: In Toronto, Organigram Global Inc. (NASDAQ: OGI) (TSX: OGI) announced that its shareholders have overwhelmingly approved the resolution needed for the acquisition of Sanity Group GmbH and the associated private placement financing with BT DE Investments Inc., a subsidiary of British American Tobacco. The acquisition and private placement were well-received, setting the stage for the successful completion of the Transaction. This significant development marks a pivotal moment for Organigram as it moves forward with this strategic move.
